debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable V
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => G ω ⊔ H ω) P =
    @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (unitInterval.symm (unitInterval.symm p * unitInterval.symm q))

failed_attempts:
by
    simpa [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl] using
      (IsBinomialRandom.compl (p := p) (G := G) (P := P) hG).inf
        (hY := IsBinomialRandom.compl (p := q) (G := H) (P := P) hY) |>.compl
  aemeasurable := by
    refine (measurable_of_countable ?_).aemeasurable
    intro u v
    simpa [sup_adj] using
      ((measurable_iff_adj (Ω := Ω) (V := V) (G := G)).1 hG.aemeasurable.measurable u v).sup
        (((measurable_iff_adj (Ω := Ω) (V := V) (G := H)).1 hY.aemeasurable.measurable u v))

by
    simpa [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl] using (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq
  aemeasurable := by fun_prop

by
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom, binomialRandom, Measure.map_comap_subtype, sup_eq_compl_inf_compl,
      Measure.map_map, Function.comp] using
      (congrArg (fun μ ↦ Measure.map (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) P) (by
        simpa [IsBinomialRandom] using (hG.compl (p := p)).map_eq.trans (hY.compl (p := q)).map_eq)).trans
        (by
          simpa [IsBinomialRandom] using
            (IsBinomialRandom.inf (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (H := fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ)
              (p := σ p) (q := σ q) (P := P) (hG := hG.compl (p := p)) (hY := hY.compl (p := q))).map_eq)
  aemeasurable := by
    have h1 : AEMeasurable G P := hG.aemeasurable
    have h2 : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
    exact (h1.sup h2)

by
    simpa [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl] using
      (isBinomialRandom_congr (P := P) (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω)) (H := fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ)
        (by
          filter_upwards with ω
          simp [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl])).1 <|
        (IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (p := σ p * σ q) (P := P)
          (IsBinomialRandom.inf (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (H := fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ)
            (p := σ p) (q := σ q) (P := P) (IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := G) (p := p) (P := P) hG)
            (IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := H) (p := q) (P := P) hY)))
  aemeasurable := by
    have hGm : AEMeasurable G P := hG.aemeasurable
    have hHm : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
    exact hGm.sup hHm

by
    have hcomp : (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ := by
      filter_upwards with ω
      simp [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl]
    have hGc : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (σ p) P := hG.compl
    have hHc : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ q) P := hY.compl
    have hInf : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ p * σ q) P := hGc.inf hHc
    have hCompl : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) (σ (σ p * σ q)) P := hInf.compl
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom, hasLaw_congr hcomp] using hCompl.map_eq
  aemeasurable := by
    have : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω ⊔ H ω).Adj) P := by
      classical
      simpa [SimpleGraph.measurable_iff_adj] using
        (aemeasurable_of_countable (f := fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω))
    simpa using this

  aemeasurable := by

    have hsup :

    have hmeasH : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable

by
    classical
    have hGc : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (σ p) P := IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := G) (p := p) (P := P) hG
    have hHc : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ q) P := IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := H) (p := q) (P := P) hY
    have hInf :
        IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (σ p * σ q) P :=
      IsBinomialRandom.inf (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (H := fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ) (p := σ p) (q := σ q) (P := P) hGc hHc
    have hCompl :

      IsBinomialRandom.compl (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (p := (σ p * σ q)) (P := P) hInf
    have hDeMorgan :
        (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) = (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) := by
      funext ω
      simpa [sup_eq, inf_eq] using (by
        ext a b
        simp [SimpleGraph.compl_adj, and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm, or_left_comm, or_assoc,
          or_comm] : ((¬ (G ω).Adj a b) ∧ ¬ (H ω).Adj a b) → False)
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom, hDeMorgan] using hCompl.map_eq
  aemeasurable := by
    have hGm : AEMeasurable G P := hG.aemeasurable
    have hYm : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
    exact hGm.sup hYm

    have hcomplG : IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (σ p) P := hG.compl (p := p) (P := P)

    have hcomplInf :
        IsBinomialRandom (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) (σ <| σ p * σ q) P :=

    have hAE :
        (fun ω ↦ ((G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ)ᶜ) =ᵐ[P] (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) := by

      (H := fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) (p := σ <| σ p * σ q) (P := P) hAE).1 hcomplInf

    have : Measurable (fun ω ↦ G ω ⊔ H ω) := by

      simpa [SimpleGraph.sup_adj] using (h1.sup h2)
    exact this.aemeasurable

by
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom, binomialRandom] using
      (hG.compl (P := P)).inf (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ) (H := fun ω ↦ (H ω)ᶜ) (p := σ p) (q := σ q)
        (hY.compl (P := P)) |>.compl (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) (p := σ p * σ q) (P := P)
        |>.map_eq
  aemeasurable := by
    have hGm : AEMeasurable G P := hG.aemeasurable
    have hHm : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
    simpa [sup_eq] using hGm.sup hHm

by
    simpa [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using
      (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq
  aemeasurable := by
    have h : AEMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (G ω)ᶜ ⊓ (H ω)ᶜ) P := (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).aemeasurable
    simpa [sup_eq_compl_inf_compl] using h.compl
